summary: Data and financial operations professional specializing in financial modeling, operational analytics, and business intelligence systems. Experienced in designing scalable reporting platforms, forecasting business performance, and delivering data-driven insights for multi-location organizations. Strong technical background in SQL, Python, and data automation combined with expertise in financial analysis and operational strategy.

education.title: Bachelor of Science — Hasan School of Business
details: 3.97 GPA, Summa Cum Laude
Double Major: Marketing and Economics with a Finance Emphasis
Relevant Coursework: Adv. Business Statistics, Entrepreneurial Finance, Money & Banking, Investment Analysis

items: Use and Integration of External APIs

companyDetails: Reported directly to the Chief Retail Officer as well as the Chief Financial Officer, supporting strategic decision-making through operational analytics and reporting initiatives.

Collaborated with multiple teams including C-Suite Leadership, Finance, Marketing & Advertising, In-Store Success Teams, and directly with multiple franchisee groups across different regional markets.

roles.title: Director of Data & Financial Operations
details: Develop enterprise-level financial models, forecasts, and performance projections supporting leadership decision-making across 36 international franchise locations.
Design and maintain financial & operational reporting used by executive leadership and stakeholders.
Built internal tools and reporting platforms used by franchisees, sales teams, and corporate success coaches.
Monitor and analyze royalty, revenue, and operational performance data across the franchise network.
Support franchisees with financial analysis, accounting workflows, and operational data interpretation.
Coordinate cross-functional projects involving finance, operations, and technology teams.
Created specialized presentations and pitch decks focused on selling large-scale franchise territories and garnering interest in direct investment into enterprise growth.
Partnered with senior leadership to integrate core internal systems, enhancing cross-team transparency and enabling faster delivery of real-time operational insights.

roles.title: Financial Analyst & Data Specialist
details: Developed financial models and forecasting tools to support enterprise and franchise performance analysis.
Produced financial and operational reports used by leadership to evaluate business performance.
Maintained data systems supporting royalty tracking and location-level reporting.
Assisted in development of dashboards and automated reporting tools.
Analyzed location-level financial data to identify trends and performance improvement opportunities.
Built API-driven internal tools that automated key operational processes, reducing manual workload and cutting process times by 90% across business workflows.

roles.title: Marketing Specialist
details: Analyzed marketing spend and performance to identify inefficiencies and improve resource allocation.
Developed live reporting dashboards using Google Sheets to monitor marketing performance and ROI.
Delivered recurring performance reports identifying optimization opportunities.
Designed and implemented a proprietary system for managing in-store retail digital display content at scale.
Utilized quantitative analysis to guide marketing strategy and campaign planning.

roles.title: Hasan School of Business Tutor
details: Tutored students in: Basic/Advanced Statistics, Principals of Finance, and Basic/Advanced Java Coding.
Assisted students with analytical problem-solving and technical coursework.
